Stability Meanings

Rising

Items with the rising tag are very likely to rise. They consistently trade or sell for more than their listed base value.

Hyped

Items with the hyped tag are often overpaid for. These items are inflated due to recent changes or events.

Overpaid

Items with the overpaid tag regularly receive offers exceeding their base value. They are in high demand and easy to trade.

Fluctuating

Items with the fluctuating tag have not yet stabilized. Their value is inconsistent and can go up or down.

Stable

Items with the stable tag consistently trade at their listed base value and are unlikely to change.

Unstable

Items with the unstable tag have not stabilized and are likely to decrease in value.

Underpaid

Items with the underpaid tag often receive lowball offers and are harder to trade due to lower demand.

Decreasing

Items with the decreasing tag are very likely to fall and typically sell below their listed base value.
